Authors: A. Halahlah; A. Kellil; S. Peltonen; T. M. Ho
AbstractMini: Reviews recent extraction, bioprocessing and product development strategies to incorporate brewing solid by-products (BSG, BSY, spent hops) into food, and evaluates consumer perception factors influencing market acceptance.
WhyRelevant: Bridges the gap between technical valorization advances and market viability by incorporating consumer-acceptance data alongside processing innovation for brewing by-products.

Title: Alternative Configurations for the Intensification of the Anaerobic Digestion Process: A Comprehensive Review
Authors: Juan García Rodríguez (et al.)
AbstractMini: Revisión de configuraciones para intensificar AD (termofílica, dos etapas ácido/gas, temperature‑phased, multietapa) con mecanismos, factores y escalabilidad.
WhyRelevant: Guía práctica para mejorar rendimiento de AD en planta y priorizar rutas de implementación.

Title: UK land use implications of replacing dairy farming with precision fermentation
Authors: Jade A. Warren; E. R. Fonseca; H. Woodward
AbstractMini: Quantifies land-use implications of scaling precision-fermented dairy protein in the UK, estimating up to 96 % lower land footprint vs. cow's milk and modelling 20–100 % replacement scenarios for 2050.
WhyRelevant: Provides macro-level sustainability evidence for PF ingredients; relevant to breweries evaluating PF-derived adjuncts or dairy-alternative functional beverages as part of ESG strategy.
